summary: Fixed critical PillarContext error causing all pillar pages to crash. Added PillarProvider to App.js and fixed setActivePet reference in PillarPageLayout.
critical_code_review_comments: PillarProvider was missing from App.js provider hierarchy - pillar pages crashed with 'usePillarContext must be used within a PillarProvider'
PillarPageLayout referenced 'setActivePet' but it was not defined - should use 'setCurrentPet' from context
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Added PillarProvider import and wrapped app with it
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test-pet-ui-1770394496293' with pets Luna and Mojo for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pillar pages now load correctly. PillarProvider is properly wrapped in App.js. Pet photo click handler in UnifiedHero navigates to /pet-soul/{petId} using window.location.assign(). Need authenticated user to fully test pet switching and bottom bar pet info.

PillarProvider_missing.issue: usePillarContext must be used within a PillarProvider error
PillarProvider_missing.cause: PillarProvider was not wrapping the app in App.js
PillarProvider_missing.fix: Added import and wrapped BrowserRouter with PillarProvider in App.js

setActivePet_undefined.issue: setActivePet function referenced but not defined in PillarPageLayout
setActivePet_undefined.fix: Changed children prop to use 'setActivePet: setCurrentPet'

mobile_navigation.navigation_icons: HOME, CARE, ORDERS, MY PET present

soul_score_arc.children_prop: PASS - Component now accepts children for wrapper pattern

pet_photo_clickability.requires_auth: YES - Pet data only loads when user is authenticated

test_coverage.unauthenticated_pages: All pillar pages load without errors
test_coverage.authenticated_features: Pet switching requires login - not fully tested
